title: Add support for --all in pypodman ps command
body:
* Updated field widths to match changes in go code
* Fixed image name truncation to match go code

Fixes #1654

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: Changes LGTM, tests aren't hip.  quick glance and it looks like the test issues are unrelated to the change.
